_meta.description: Names and titles of God in the Bible
_meta.note: Includes Hebrew (OT) and Greek (NT) names with meanings

names.name: Elohim
names.usage: Used over 2,500 times; emphasizes God's power and might

names.name: YHWH (Yahweh)
names.usage: The personal covenant name of God; occurs over 6,800 times

names.name: Adonai
names.usage: Emphasizes God's authority and lordship

names.name: El Shaddai
names.usage: Emphasizes God's all-sufficient power

names.name: El Elyon
names.usage: Emphasizes God's supreme position

names.name: El Olam
names.usage: Emphasizes God's eternal nature

names.name: El Roi
names.usage: Hagar's name for God after He saw her distress

names.name: YHWH Yireh
names.usage: Abraham's name for the place where God provided a ram

names.name: YHWH Rapha
names.usage: Revealed at Marah regarding Israel's health

names.name: YHWH Nissi
names.usage: Moses' altar name after victory over Amalek

names.name: YHWH Shalom
names.usage: Gideon's altar name after seeing the Angel of the LORD

names.name: YHWH Sabaoth
names.usage: Emphasizes God's command of heavenly armies

names.name: YHWH Rohi
names.usage: David's declaration of God's care

names.name: YHWH Tsidkenu
names.usage: Messianic title prophesied by Jeremiah

names.name: YHWH Shammah
names.usage: Name of the eschatological city in Ezekiel's vision

names.name: Qanna
names.usage: Describes God's righteous jealousy for His people

names.name: Attiq Yomin
names.usage: Daniel's vision of God on His throne

names.name: Theos
names.usage: General Greek word for God; used over 1,300 times in NT

names.name: Kyrios
names.usage: Greek equivalent of Adonai; applied to Jesus

names.name: Pater
names.usage: Jesus' characteristic address for God

names.name: Abba
names.usage: Intimate term for father; used by Jesus and believers

names.name: Pantokrator
names.usage: Emphasizes God's supreme power; used in Revelation

names.name: Alpha and Omega
names.usage: God as beginning and end of all things

names.name: I AM
names.usage: Jesus' claim to deity, echoing Exodus 3:14

categories.Compound Names: Names combined with YHWH or El
categories.NT Names: Greek names and titles used in the New Testament
